title: Record and document Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Community history
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Record and document Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Community history demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for consultation with Community members

pcs.text: Determine purpose and objectives of consultation and document
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine purpose and objectives of consultation and document?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine purpose and objectives of consultation and document.

pcs.text: Research and document background of topic and events
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and document background of topic and events?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and document background of topic and events.

pcs.text: Identify sensitive topics that may cause distress and communicate to management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify sensitive topics that may cause distress and communicate to management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify sensitive topics that may cause distress and communicate to management.

pcs.text: Identify local Community members (Narrators) who can provide information on topic and events
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify local Community members (Narrators) who can provide information on topic and events?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify local Community members (Narrators) who can provide information on topic and events.

pcs.text: Develop process for individual or group sessions with Narrators according to topic and events to be covered
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop process for individual or group sessions with Narrators according to topic and events to be covered?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop process for individual or group sessions with Narrators according to topic and events to be covered.

pcs.text: Develop and check questions for interviews with Narrators
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and check questions for interviews with Narrators?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and check questions for interviews with Narrators.

pcs.text: Obtain and check equipment, locations and other resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and check equipment, locations and other resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and check equipment, locations and other resources.

pcs.text: Obtain permissions from local Cultural Authority and Community members to conduct interviews about Community history and culture
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain permissions from local Cultural Authority and Community members to conduct interviews about Community history and culture?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain permissions from local Cultural Authority and Community members to conduct interviews about Community history and culture.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for consultation with Community members

elements.title: Conduct interviews with Community members

pcs.text: Explain interview process to Narrators to obtain their informed consent to record and use information provided
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain interview process to Narrators to obtain their informed consent to record and use information provided?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain interview process to Narrators to obtain their informed consent to record and use information provided.

pcs.text: Set up and test recording equipment for operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set up and test recording equipment for operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set up and test recording equipment for operation.

pcs.text: Follow cultural protocols and use appropriate language
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow cultural protocols and use appropriate language?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow cultural protocols and use appropriate language.

pcs.text: Initiate the conversation using culturally appropriate communication
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Initiate the conversation using culturally appropriate communication?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Initiate the conversation using culturally appropriate communication.

pcs.text: Take notes to identify supplementary questions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take notes to identify supplementary questions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take notes to identify supplementary questions.

pcs.text: Manage communication process to obtain expected and unexpected information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manage communication process to obtain expected and unexpected information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage communication process to obtain expected and unexpected information.

pcs.text: Support narrator and provide positive feedback
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Support narrator and provide positive feedback?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Support narrator and provide positive feedback.

pcs.text: Manage the environment, distractions and session length
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manage the environment, distractions and session length?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage the environment, distractions and session length.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct interviews with Community members

elements.title: Transcribe and edit information

pcs.text: Handle recorded media and transcripts to maintain recording quality and accuracy, and security and privacy requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure confidentiality measures are implemented to control access to records.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
